sections.paragraph:
καθήγησις, εως, ἡ (s. next entry; since I b.c. in the mng. ‘rule, principle’) prob. instruction μ̣ε̣|γάλῃ καθ̣[ηγήσει] with thorough instruction (?) AcPl Ha 6, 31.—DELG s.v. ἡγέομαι.

mng. mng. = meaning(s)

prob. prob. = probable, probably

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 490
